docket_entries.description: CHALLENGE TO VENUE FILED BY DEFENDANT WITHROW, MARK
CHALLENGE TO VENUE FILED NOTICE OF VENUE CHALLENGE MAILED TO ALL PARTIES FILED BY DEFENDANT WITHROW, MARK AS TO PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, ABRAHAM

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-17-2022 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE UNAVAILABILITY OF A JUDICIAL OFFICER TO HEAR TODAY'S MATTER TO DEC-14-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ABRAHAM LOPEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARK WITHROW IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF ABRAHAM LOPEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARK WITHROW IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, ABRAHAM AS TO DEFENDANT WITHROW, MARK
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LOPEZ, ABRAHAM AS TO DEFENDANT WITHROW, MARK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $151.50) SERVED OCT-19-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WITHROW, MARK
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY LOPEZ, ABRAHAM
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST.
REMARK:RETURN MAIL RECD 9/27/22. SC-100 MAILED CERTIFIED TO MARK WITHROW-UNCLAIMED
